---
title: "Sea Spleenwort, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Sea Spleenwort, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1862
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** Groombridge and Sons, 5, Paternoster Row, London.

### Notes

Magnet Stories for Summer Days and Winter Nights; 8 vols., 1860-5. Advertised as “A new story every month - Each complete in itself.”

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
